title: leymus triticoides subsp. multiflorus
intro: Leymus triticoides subsp. multiflorus, also known as big blue grass or blue grama, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Leymus triticoides subsp. multiflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit potential antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Leymus triticoides subsp. multiflorus can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
